items.title: Update Suno Pricing to 0.77 Credits in Backend 🎶
items.summary: This update raises the pricing for Suno music generation actions from 0.55 to 0.77 Credits. The changes ensure that the runtime API billing and service-page display pricing remain aligned. Additionally, focused regression tests have been added for the adjusted actions while maintaining checks for unchanged actions.

items.title: Introducing CNBlogs Publishing Skill in Skills 🚀
items.summary: This update adds a new CNBlogs publishing skill, featuring a CLI and agent that adheres to the official CNBlogs API. Key functionalities include token verification, post management (create, update, delete), and draft handling, ensuring a streamlined user experience. Comprehensive tests validate the implementation, enhancing reliability and performance.

items.title: Introducing CNBlogs PAT Publishing Connector in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update adds a new CNBlogs publishing connector that allows users to connect using a personal access token securely. The connector features an official CNBlogs icon and integrates with the existing skill set for enhanced publishing suggestions. Comprehensive testing has been conducted to ensure functionality and reliability.

items.title: Enhance LLM Stream Reliability in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the reliability of LLM stream handling by implementing retries for stalled first-token streams, allowing up to three attempts if no meaningful SSE event is received within 60 seconds. Additionally, the timeout for post-first-event streams has been extended to 600 seconds, and measures have been taken to prevent orphaned requests when clients disconnect. The changes have been validated with comprehensive tests, ensuring robust performance.

items.title: Remove Incorrect `type` Field from Cursor MCP Config in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update eliminates the fabricated `type` field from the Cursor MCP configuration template, aligning it with official documentation. The change ensures that the configuration is accurate and prevents confusion for users copying the template. This fix is part of a preventive measure before the MCP variants are verified and made live.

items.title: Revamped Earning Documentation in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update overhauls the earning documentation, removing references to Nexior deployment and replacing them with a no-code Studio white-label setup. A total of 30 document files were modified or added, featuring real screenshots and examples to enhance clarity and accuracy. Key improvements include updated marketing content and connector visuals, ensuring a more user-friendly experience.

items.title: Fix Skill Install Command to Use Release Tags in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update resolves an issue where the Skill install command was incorrectly using a SHA, which led to silent failures. The command now correctly pins to a published Skills release tag, ensuring that the correct version is installed. All relevant services have been updated and validated, resulting in successful tests and a clean implementation.

items.title: Update markdown-it-anchor to 9.2.1 in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the markdown-it-anchor dependency from version 9.2.0 to 9.2.1. The new version preserves the level of inline tokens in header links, enhancing the functionality of the markdown parser. This change is expected to improve the overall rendering of markdown content in the application.
